introSection: Il Bruco Magico was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Mirabilandia in Savio, Emilia-Romagna, Italy. The ride opened in 1998 and closed in 2000 to make room for Family Adventure. Sierra Tonante was Italian for Magic Caterpillar.
fullText:
Il Bruco Magico was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Mirabilandia in Savio, Emilia-Romagna, Italy. The ride opened in 1998 and closed in 2000 to make room for Family Adventure. Sierra Tonante was Italian for Magic Caterpillar.



Blue track and white supports.
